title: dendrobium mohlianum subsp. mohlianum
intro: Dendrobium mohlianum subsp. mohlianum, also known as the "Rock Orchid," is a type of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The Rock Orchid is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
